_comment: Run-level manifest. Lives at <run_dir>/run.json. Written by orchestrator at Phase 2.1; updated as topics transition status. Phase -1 re-entry detection scans this file across all run dirs to find in-flight batches.

_status_legend.queued: topic-* task created but not yet owned by a runner (concurrency cap reached)
_status_legend.in_progress: topic-runner is alive and working — see topic state.json for step detail
_status_legend.ready_for_review: Phase 3.11 done; awaiting Phase 4 user gate
_status_legend.uploaded: Phase 5 done; verify.json on disk; Notion Status=Done
_status_legend.failed: terminal failure recorded in topic state.json errors[]
_status_legend.skipped: user picked Skip in Phase 4 review
